scenario: technical warm-up and raw-stream sanity check before the C2 support capture
objective: confirm that AP state, serial capture, and block-event logging are stable before collecting the longer support windows
instructions: Stay outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Do not move the chair, AP node, table, capture node, or cables.;;If raw serial output or AP state looks unstable, stop before E1.

scenario: extended empty reference for reduced-density and compression support
objective: collect a longer empty control segment suitable for later subsampling and comparator baselines
instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged and avoid nearby activity.

objective: capture a longer static-presence window for later reduced-density comparisons
instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Stand almost still with a natural posture.;;Do not touch the chair, AP node, table, or cables.

objective: capture a longer slow-motion window for later reduced-density comparisons
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Move slowly back and forth without leaving the corridor.;;Do not change the topology of the stand.

scenario: extended empty recovery after the first long cycle
objective: check the reverse transition back to empty with a longer recovery segment
instructions: Leave the controlled path again.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: second extended static presence support segment
objective: provide an in-session repeat for the static-presence support data
instructions: Return to the midpoint of the controlled path.;;Stand almost still in approximately the same position as in S1.;;Avoid extra motion not needed for the block.

objective: provide an in-session repeat for the slow-motion support data
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.;;Repeat the same slow motion pattern as closely as practical.;;Do not move chairs, table, AP node, capture node, or cables.

scenario: final extended empty recovery for comparator anchoring
objective: finish the support set with a second long empty reference for comparator anchoring
instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
